Benefits That Go Beyond the Basics

We invest in our team because great people make great companies. Here's what you'll get.

Comprehensive Health

Full medical, dental, vision for you and your family. Mental health support included.

401(k) + Match

6% employer match, fully vested from day one. Financial wellness resources.

Remote-First Culture

Flexible remote and hybrid options for eligible roles. Quarterly all-hands meetups.

Unlimited PTO

Truly unlimited paid time off with minimum 15 days annual leave encouraged.

$2,000 Home Office

Annual home office stipend plus latest MacBook or PC setup from day one.

Learning & Development

$5,000 annual education budget for courses, conferences, and certifications.

Parental Leave

16 weeks fully paid leave for primary caregivers, 8 weeks for secondary.

Green Perks

EV charging at offices, commuter stipend, and sustainability bonus programs.
